projects.title: AI-Powered Portfolio & ATS Resume Builder
projects.description: Created a full-stack portfolio website using Flask, HTML, CSS, and JSON with a secure admin panel for content management. Integrated an ATS-friendly resume generator that dynamically generates professional PDF resumes from portfolio information, ensuring that updates are reflected automatically across both the portfolio and resume.

projects.title: Task and Time Management App
projects.description: Designed and developed the frontend interface of an offline task and time management application. Created responsive screens for task management, priority setting, Pomodoro timer, voice reminder interface, and routine history using a user-friendly design.

publications.title: AI - Driven Bandwidth Optimization In Solar-Powered Community Mesh Networks For Rural Connectivity  -  1st International Conference on Advance in Science, Technology and Humanities (ICASTH'2026)
Task And Time Management App  -  International Conference on Computers and Communication Engineering (ICCCE-26)
